title: Rasautou.exe
html:
Rasautou.exe

Windows Remote Access Dialer

Execute

Execute DLL code

rasautou -d {PATH:.dll} -p export_name -a a -e e

Loads the target .DLL specified in -d and executes the export specified in -p. Options removed in Windows 10. — MITRE: T1218 — Privileges: User, Administrator in Windows 8
